expectations.evidence: Executed 27 SQL queries covering 10,251 contracts. Flag distribution, danger flags, largest contracts, fresh companies, micro suppliers, etc.
Flag distribution table by severity and type shown in Phase 1 summary
Each finding challenged against innocent explanations. 5 survived, 3 partially survived, 3 did not survive.
Findings classified as survived/partially survived/did not survive (equivalent to CONFIRMED/INCONCLUSIVE/DISMISSED)
No phase gating logic applied. Report doesn't assess whether Phases 3-5 are needed based on finding count.
Report in Slovak with zlte stopy terminology. Missing 'Dakujeme Zltej Stope' ending.
